title: Transport truck with a manual screw jack lift
abstract: Transport trolley with a manual screw jack, wherein the wheels (1), are situated on two parallel rails (2), with a mast (3) in the form of two channel sections, connected to the top of a mast is the transverse stabilizing element (11), the load platform (4) is raised by bogie means of a screw mechanism (5), the load platform (4) is fixed to a mast (3) by guide means (6), the screw mechanism (5) is connected to pulley block by a steel cable (7), through movement crank (15) the cable (7) is wound onto the drum (implicit, part of the pulley arrangement) and the gearwheel detent lock (8) locks the releasing of the cable (7) and thereby prevents the dropping of the load platform (4) the screw mechanism (5) is mounted on the mast and a handle (13) is fastened to the mast in order to move and maneuver the trolley.
claims: Claims Patent claim Transport trolley with a manual screw jack, characterized in that the wheel / 1 /, are situated in two parallel facing rails / 2 /, which is the mast / 3 / in the form of two channel sections connected to the top of the mast the transverse stabilizing element / 1 1 /, to raise the floor - a platform / 4 / bogie by means of the worm 1 5 1, the platform / 4 / fixed to a mast / 3 / by means of guides / 6 /, while the mechanism of the screw / 5 / a steel cord / 7 / on the pad / 9 /, which through movement crank / 15 /, the cable / 7 / is wound onto the drum / 14 / and a lock / 8 / gearwheel of the detent release the rope / 7 / i dropping of the load platform / 4 /, and the carriage chassis comprises two parallel rails / 2 / in the form of U-profiles, connected to the transverse reinforcement elements / 0 /, wherein the two parallel elements / 2 / pole / 3 / are mounted guides / 6 /, which moves the loading / 4 /, the mast is also fastened mechanism / 5 / lifting the loading / 4 /, and handles / 3 /, to move and maneuver the truck.
